summary: iOS ⛔ HSFWCH-10248 | INTERMITTENT | OSPREY 🦅 Putting one earbud in CC sometimes causes both earbuds to disconnect
scenario: Placing one earbud in the charging case causes both earbuds to disconnect instead of only the placed one.
description_clean: Putting one earbud in the charging case sometimes causes both earbuds to disconnect. Steps: pair Free 60+ with app, take both earbuds out of case, place only one earbud (presumably primary) in the case. Expected: only the placed earbud disconnects; the other should remain connected.
steps: Take both earbuds out of the charging case
Place only one earbud (presumably the primary) back into the charging case
expected: Only the placed earbud disconnects; the other earbud should remain connected.
actual: Both earbuds disconnect when only one is placed in the charging case.
